items.name: Mawa Gujiya
items.description: Exquisite baked pastry filled with rich khoya, nuts, and aromatic cardamom.

items.name: Chocolate Gujiya
items.description: Traditional crust filled with molten chocolate, finished with a precise zigzag chocolate drizzle on top.

items.name: Whole Wheat Gujiya
items.description: A wholesome, fiber-rich alternative made with pure whole wheat and mawa filling.

items.name: Dry Fruit Premium Gujiya
items.description: Luxury festive treat loaded with premium almonds, pistachios, and saffron.

items.name: Thandai Cake
items.description: Infused with traditional thandai spices, rose petals, and creamy white frosting.

items.name: Rasmalai Cake
items.description: Dreamy sponge soaked in saffron milk, topped with malai cream and nuts.

items.name: Holi Bento Cake
items.description: Perfect mini celebration cake with cute festive designs and moist sponge layers.

items.name: Thandai Chocolate Bar
items.description: White chocolate tinted pale yellow, infused with saffron and topped with almonds and thandai spices.

items.name: Paan Chocolate Bar
items.description: Traditional dark chocolate bar, richly infused with betel leaf essence and gulkand.

items.name: Rose Pistachio White Chocolate
items.description: Elegant white chocolate bar featuring dried rose petals and crunchy Iranian pistachios.

items.name: Classic Fudgy Brownie
items.description: Intense dark chocolate brownie with a perfectly crackly top and gooey center.

items.name: Walnut Brownie
items.description: Traditional fudge brownie packed with toasted walnuts for that classic crunch.

items.name: Chocolate Chip Brownie
items.description: Dual chocolate delight with semi-sweet morsels baked into every rich bite.

items.name: Chocolate Truffle Cupcake
items.description: Velvety cocoa base topped with a smooth, glossy chocolate ganache swirl.

items.name: Rainbow Frosted Cupcake
items.description: Celebratory treats featuring multi-colored buttercream peaks and festive sparkles.
